services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts the document processing API and orchestrates the pipeline

services.name: Document Intelligence
services.description: Performs OCR and document structure extraction

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Generates summaries and insights from extracted text

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Indexes documents and metadata for full-text and semantic search

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Stores document metadata and AI-generated insights

services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Retains original documents and extracted artifacts as blobs

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Provides user authentication and access tokens for the API

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Stores secrets and credentials for downstream AI and data services

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects telemetry and performance metrics from the application

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Central workspace for querying logs and metrics from the pipeline

connections.label: Request user authentication and acquire access tokens for document upload
Retrieve service credentials and API keys for Document Intelligence and Azure OpenAI
Submit uploaded document for OCR and layout extraction
Persist original files and extracted structured outputs as blobs
Send extracted text and key fields for summarization and insight generation
Return summarized content and extracted insights to orchestrator
Store document metadata, processing status, and AI-generated summaries
Push document text and metadata for search index update
Retrieve document content or attachments for indexing and search results
Access enriched metadata as an external data source during indexing and querying
Emit application logs, pipeline metrics, and custom events
Ingest collected telemetry into centralized log workspace

workflow.description: User uploads a document through the App Service API, which validates the request via Microsoft Entra ID authentication.
App Service retrieves necessary secrets from Key Vault and submits the document to Document Intelligence for OCR and layout analysis.
Document Intelligence processes the file and stores the original document and extracted structured outputs in the Storage Account.
Document Intelligence sends extracted text and key fields to Azure OpenAI for summarization and advanced language understanding.
Azure OpenAI returns summaries and insights to App Service, which then persists the metadata and AI results in Azure Cosmos DB.
App Service pushes searchable content and enriched metadata into Azure Cognitive Search to update the index.
Azure Cognitive Search uses blob content from Storage Account and metadata from Azure Cosmos DB to serve rich search and retrieval experiences.
During processing and querying, App Service sends telemetry to Azure Monitor, which aggregates the data and stores it in Log Analytics for analysis.

metadata.prompt: An intelligent document processing pipeline with Azure AI Document Intelligence for OCR, Azure OpenAI for summarization, Cognitive Search for indexing, Cosmos DB for metadata, and Blob Storage for document retention
